testcase.name: List all document types
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given the following document types exist in the system:.....................passed When I request all document types...........................................passed Then I should receive 5 document types......................................passed And the document types should include:......................................passed And each document type should have the required fields:.....................passed

testcase.name: List only active document types
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given the following document types exist in the system:.....................passed When I request only active document types...................................passed Then I should receive 2 document types......................................passed And all returned document types should be active............................passed And the active document types should be:....................................passed

testcase.name: Create a new document type successfully
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed When I create a document type with the following details:...................passed Then the document type should be created successfully.......................passed And the document type should have the code "VISA"...........................passed And the document type should be active......................................passed

testcase.name: Create document type with duplicate code
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given a document type with code "PASSPORT" already exists...................passed When I create a new document type with code "PASSPORT"......................passed Then the document type creation should fail.................................passed And I should receive an error about duplicate document type code............passed

testcase.name: Retrieve document type by code
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given a document type exists with the following details:....................passed When I request the document type by code "DNI"..............................passed Then I should receive the document type details.............................passed And the details should match the created document type......................passed

testcase.name: Search document types by name
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given the following document types exist in the system:.....................passed When I search for document types containing "License".......................passed Then I should receive 2 document types......................................passed And the returned document types should be:..................................passed

testcase.name: List document types with pagination
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given there are 15 document types in the system.............................passed When I request document types with page size 5 and page number 2............passed Then I should receive 5 document types......................................passed And the response should indicate page 2 of 3 total pages....................passed And the response should include pagination metadata.........................passed

testcase.name: Register a new guest successfully
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed When I create a new guest with the following details:.......................passed Then the guest should be created successfully...............................passed And the guest should have a unique ID.......................................passed And the guest creation event should be published............................passed

testcase.name: Register guest with invalid email
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed When I create a new guest with invalid email "invalid-email"................passed Then the guest creation should fail.........................................passed And I should receive a validation error about invalid email format..........passed

testcase.name: Register duplicate guest
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given a guest exists with email "existing@email.com"........................passed When I create a new guest with email "existing@email.com"...................passed Then the guest creation should fail.........................................passed And I should receive an error about duplicate email.........................passed

testcase.name: Retrieve guest information
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given a guest exists with the following details:............................passed When I request the guest information by ID..................................passed Then I should receive the guest details.....................................passed And the details should match the created guest..............................passed

testcase.name: List all guests
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given the following guests exist:...........................................passed When I request the list of all guests.......................................passed Then I should receive 3 guests..............................................passed And the list should contain all created guests..............................passed

testcase.name: Update guest contact information
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given a guest exists with email "update@email.com"..........................passed When I update the guest's contact information:..............................passed Then the guest's contact information should be updated......................passed And the new information should be persisted.................................passed

testcase.name: Filter reservations by status - CONFIRMED
testcase.system-out: Given the database is clean.................................................passed Given the following guests exist:...........................................passed And the following room types exist:.........................................passed And the following rooms exist:..............................................passed And the following reservations exist:.......................................passed When I filter reservations by status "CONFIRMED"............................passed Then the response should be successful......................................passed And I should receive 2 reservations.........................................passed And all returned reservations should have status "CONFIRMED"................passed

testcase.name: Filter reservations by status - CHECKED_IN
testcase.system-out: Given the database is clean.................................................passed Given the following guests exist:...........................................passed And the following room types exist:.........................................passed And the following rooms exist:..............................................passed And the following reservations exist:.......................................passed When I filter reservations by status "CHECKED_IN"...........................passed Then the response should be successful......................................passed And I should receive 2 reservations.........................................passed And all returned reservations should have status "CHECKED_IN"...............passed

testcase.name: Create a new reservation successfully
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed And the following room types exist:.........................................passed And the following rooms exist:..............................................passed Given a guest exists with email "guest@email.com"...........................passed When I create a reservation with the following details:.....................passed Then the reservation should be created successfully.........................passed And the reservation should have a unique code...............................passed And the reservation status should be CONFIRMED..............................passed And the reservation creation event should be published......................passed

testcase.name: Create reservation with invalid dates
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed And the following room types exist:.........................................passed And the following rooms exist:..............................................passed Given a guest exists with email "guest@email.com"...........................passed When I create a reservation with check-out date before check-in date........passed Then the reservation creation should fail...................................passed And I should receive a validation error about invalid dates.................passed

testcase.name: Create reservation for non-existent guest
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed And the following room types exist:.........................................passed And the following rooms exist:..............................................passed When I create a reservation for non-existent guest "nonexistent@email.com"..passed Then the reservation creation should fail...................................passed And I should receive an error about guest not found.........................passed

testcase.name: Create reservation for unavailable room
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed And the following room types exist:.........................................passed And the following rooms exist:..............................................passed Given a guest exists with email "guest@email.com"...........................passed And room "101" is occupied from "2026-03-01" to "2026-03-05"................passed When I create a reservation for room "101" from "2026-03-02" to "2026-03-04".passed Then the reservation creation should fail...................................passed And I should receive an error about room availability.......................passed

testcase.name: Check-in a confirmed reservation
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed And the following room types exist:.........................................passed And the following rooms exist:..............................................passed Given a guest exists with email "checkin@email.com".........................passed And a confirmed reservation exists for the guest............................passed When I check-in the reservation.............................................passed Then the reservation status should be CHECKED_IN............................passed And the check-in date should be recorded....................................passed And the room status should be OCCUPIED......................................passed

testcase.name: Check-out a checked-in reservation
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed And the following room types exist:.........................................passed And the following rooms exist:..............................................passed Given a guest exists with email "checkout@email.com"........................passed And a checked-in reservation exists for the guest...........................passed When I check-out the reservation............................................passed Then the reservation status should be CHECKED_OUT...........................passed And the check-out date should be recorded...................................passed And the room status should be AVAILABLE.....................................passed

testcase.name: List reservations for a date range
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed And the following room types exist:.........................................passed And the following rooms exist:..............................................passed Given a guest exists with email "list@email.com"............................passed And the following reservations exist:.......................................passed When I request reservations for March 2026..................................passed Then I should receive 2 reservations........................................passed And all reservations should be within the requested date range..............passed

testcase.name: Calculate pricing based on stay duration
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed And the following room types exist:.........................................passed And the following rooms exist:..............................................passed Given a guest exists with email "pricing@email.com".........................passed When I create a reservation for 7 nights in a Single room...................passed Then the system should apply long stay discount.............................passed And the total amount should reflect the discounted price....................passed

testcase.name: Create a new room type successfully
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed When I create a room type with the following details:.......................passed Then the room type should be created successfully...........................passed And the room type should have a unique ID...................................passed

testcase.name: Create a new room successfully
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given a room type "Single" exists with base price 50.00.....................passed When I create a room with the following details:............................passed Then the room should be created successfully................................passed And the room should have a unique ID........................................passed And the room status should be AVAILABLE.....................................passed

testcase.name: Create room with duplicate number
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given a room "101" already exists...........................................passed When I create a new room with number "101"..................................passed Then the room creation should fail..........................................passed And I should receive an error about duplicate room number...................passed

testcase.name: List all available rooms
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given the following rooms exist:............................................passed When I request all available rooms..........................................passed Then I should receive 2 rooms...............................................passed And all returned rooms should have status AVAILABLE.........................passed

testcase.name: Find available rooms by criteria
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given the following rooms exist with room types:............................passed When I search for available rooms with capacity for 2 guests................passed Then I should receive rooms that can accommodate 2 or more guests...........passed And all returned rooms should have status AVAILABLE.........................passed

testcase.name: Change room status for maintenance
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given a room "201" exists with status AVAILABLE.............................passed When I change the room status to MAINTENANCE................................passed Then the room status should be updated to MAINTENANCE.......................passed And the room should not appear in available rooms list......................passed

testcase.name: Search rooms by date availability
testcase.system-out: Given the system is running.................................................passed And the database is clean...................................................passed Given the following rooms exist:............................................passed And room "301" has reservation from "2026-03-01" to "2026-03-05"............passed When I search for available rooms from "2026-03-02" to "2026-03-04".........passed Then I should receive only room "302".......................................passed And room "301" should not be included due to existing reservation...........passed
